heading: Separation of Government personnel during fellowships
label: 6103 Separation of Government personnel during fellowships

children.heading: Separation
children.label: a Separation
children.text: Under such terms and conditions as the agency head may direct, any agency of the United States Government may separate from Government service for a specified period any officer or employee of that agency who accepts a fellowship under the program established by this chapter and is not detailed under .section 6104 of this title

children.heading: Reemployment
children.label: b Reemployment
children.text: Any fellow who is not a detailee, at the end of the fellowship, is entitled to be reemployed in the same manner as if covered by .section 3582 of title 5

children.heading: Rights and benefits
children.label: c Rights and benefits
children.text: Notwithstanding section 8347(), 8713, or 8914 of title 5 and in accordance with regulations of the Office of Personnel Management, an employee, while serving as a fellow who is not a detailee, is entitled to the same rights and benefits as if covered by . The Center shall reimburse the employing agency for any costs incurred under .osection 3582 of title 5section 3582 of title 5

children.heading: Compliance with Budget Act
children.label: d Compliance with Budget Act
children.text: Funds are available under this section to the extent and in the amounts provided in appropriation Acts.
